channel.title: GitHub Kotlin Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Kotlin in GitHub

item.title: ethereum-lists/chains
item.description: provides metadata for chains

item.title: MatsuriDayo/NekoBoxForAndroid
item.description: NekoBox for Android / sing-box / universal proxy toolchain for Android

item.title: z-huang/InnerTune
item.description: A Material 3 YouTube Music client for Android

item.title: recloudstream/cloudstream
item.description: Android app for streaming and downloading media.

item.title: lizongying/my-tv-0
item.description: 我的電視·〇 電視視頻播放軟件，可以自定義視頻源

item.title: android/architecture-samples
item.description: A collection of samples to discuss and showcase different architectural tools and patterns for Android apps.

item.title: RikkaApps/Shizuku
item.description: Using system APIs directly with adb/root privileges from normal apps through a Java process started with app_process.

item.title: breezy-weather/breezy-weather
item.description: A Material Design Weather Application

item.title: simplex-chat/simplex-chat
item.description: SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!

item.title: tiann/KernelSU
item.description: A Kernel based root solution for Android

item.title: mobile-dev-inc/maestro
item.description: Painless Mobile UI Automation

item.title: Kotlin/kotlinx.coroutines
item.description: Library support for Kotlin coroutines

item.title: element-hq/element-x-android
item.description: Android Matrix messenger application using the Matrix Rust Sdk and Jetpack Compose

item.title: DerGoogler/MMRL
item.description: MMRL is an Android app that helps manage your own modules repository.

item.title: null2264/yokai
item.description: Free and open source manga reader for Android

item.title: firebase/quickstart-android
item.description: Firebase Quickstart Samples for Android

item.title: bitwarden/android
item.description: Bitwarden mobile app for Android.

item.title: JetBrains/compose-multiplatform
item.description: Compose Multiplatform, a modern UI framework for Kotlin that makes building performant and beautiful user interfaces easy and enjoyable.

item.title: Nain57/Smart-AutoClicker
item.description: An open-source auto clicker on images for Android

item.title: yairm210/Unciv
item.description: Open-source Android/Desktop remake of Civ V
